title: Potato's Chips 'n' Skills
description: A datapackable RPG skills & leveling system
body:
![Skill Point Orb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f6ae88b88f6d7b75805151da9267209f6d8b36c.png)

Potato's Chips 'n' Skills, also known as RPGSkills, adds a datapackable skills system that allows you to gate blocks & items behind skill requirements. It is intended to be configured for modpacks centered around defeating various bosses.

The mod allows you to create:

- Leveling & skill points you can collect by killing mobs & other activities
- Skills you can level up
- Content and abilities unlocked by skills
- Classes to choose from
- Jobs you can complete to earn skill points
- And more!

Take a look at the [wiki](https://github.com/ThePotatoArchivist/RPGSkills/wiki) to get started with writing datapacks for this mod.

Note: The skills in the gallery are from a modpack for a private server, it may be publicized eventually.
